files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section at the beginning. The 3W Framework is partially applied - has 'ทำไม' (Why) well but missing explicit 'What' summary and 'How' roadmap. Add Key Takeaways summary at end.
files.01_Introduction.md: Add Learning Objectives. Strengthen 3W Framework - make 'What' (BC definition) more explicit upfront, add 'How' implementation roadmap. The 'Why' is well-covered. Add Key Takeaways.
files.02_Fundamental_Classification.md: Good content but needs Learning Objectives upfront. 3W Framework partially present - explicitly structure sections as What/Why/How headers. Add visual decision summary diagram. Add Key Takeaways summary table comparing all BC types.
files.03_Selection_Guide_Which_BC_to_Use.md: Strong practical content but needs Learning Objectives. Convert decision trees into visual flowchart format. Add 'quick reference card' summary table. Add Key Takeaways - BC selection heuristics.
files.04_Mathematical_Formulation.md: Add Learning Objectives - specify what math level expected. 3W not explicit - reorganize with clear What/Why/How headers. Add connection to practical implementation - 'Why this math matters'. Add Key Takeaways - essential formulas cheat sheet.
files.05_Common_Boundary_Conditions_in_OpenFOA: Comprehensive but needs Learning Objectives. 3W Framework - add explicit 'What' overview section. Add troubleshooting subsection for each BC type. Create BC comparison matrix. Add Key Takeaways.
files.06_Advanced_Boundary_Conditions.md: Add Learning Objectives - clarify prerequisites. Add use-case decision table at beginning. 3W not explicit - structure with What/Why/How. Add performance considerations section. Add Key Takeaways.
files.07_Troubleshooting_Boundary_Conditions.m: Good diagnostic content. Add Learning Objectives - 'What you'll learn to debug'. Add symptom-based quick reference table at beginning. Add flowchart for troubleshooting process. Add Key Takeaways - common pitfalls summary.
files.08_Exercises.md: Add Learning Objectives - skills to be practiced. Organize exercises by difficulty level. Add estimated time for each exercise. Add solution verification checklist. Create 'Exercise Summary' table showing which concepts each exercise tests.

global_strategy: This folder has strong technical content with excellent code examples, but systematically lacks: (1) Learning Objectives at the start of EVERY file, (2) Explicit 3W Framework section headers (What/Why/How), (3) Key Takeaways summaries at the end, (4) Visual decision aids/flowcharts for BC selection. The redundancy between files is moderate - 01_Introduction and 02_Fundamental_Classification overlap significantly on Dirichlet/Neumann/Robin definitions; consider merging or more clearly differentiating (01: concepts, 02: detailed implementation). Also add cross-reference navigation when BC types are mentioned across multiple files. Create visual summary diagrams for the decision trees in file 03.
